title: Chocolate Bark
instructions: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in short intervals, stirring until completely smooth.
Pour the melted chocolate onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and spread it into an even layer.
Immediately sprinkle the Yummi Pops Sal Marina, pressing lightly so they adhere, and finish with a touch of flaky sea salt.
Let cool at room temperature or refrigerate until the chocolate is firm. Break into irregular pieces and serve.
chef_tips: Use high-quality chocolate (at least 70% cacao) for the best flavor and shine.
Press the Yummi Pops firmly onto the chocolate before it sets so they stick perfectly.
Refrigerate the bark for at least 30 minutes so it sets firm and breaks cleanly into pieces.
